security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Modern SSH client and SFTP file manager
bundle.longDescription: Harbor is a modern, secure cross-platform SSH client and SFTP file manager — a clean alternative to PuTTY + WinSCP.
